close_reason: Style: 5 occurrences of 'file' literal is fine for a small crate
description: Lines 50, 83, 90, 116, 122, 218, 226 each contain the literal string "file". A const BACKEND_NAME: &str = "file" at module top would (a) make a future rename a one-line change, (b) signal that all five sites refer to the same registered backend identifier. Already SecretError::Backend wants &'static str so this composes cleanly.
title: [chore] backend name 'file' literal repeated 5x — extract const
